name: invoker
description: Auditable multi-agent orchestration with a mutating action graph

scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @invoker/ui build && pnpm --filter @invoker/app build && pnpm --filter @invoker/app start
scripts.dev:hot: concurrently "pnpm --filter @invoker/ui dev" "sleep 3 && VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 pnpm --filter @invoker/app build && VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 pnpm --filter @invoker/app start"
